title: clausena pentaphylla
intro: Clausena pentaphylla, also known as Thai bitters or pokok sembilan, is a small tree or shrub native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Clausena pentaphylla include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve fever and cough, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Clausena pentaphylla can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed as a tea or taken in capsule form.
